title: That's How Love Starts, Ya Know!
overview: Momo believes in ghosts. Okarun believes in aliens. To make each other believe what they deny, they head to a spot famous for UFO sightings and a spiritual hotspot.

title: That's a Space Alien, Ain't It?!
overview: Momo awakens psychic powers, while Okarun is cursed by Turbo Granny. They evacuate to Momo's house, but a giant alien appears before them.

title: It's a Granny vs. Granny Clash!
overview: After Momo's grandmother temporarily suppresses the evil spirit within Okarun, she says that a game of tag may be the key to defeating it for good.

title: Kicking Turbo Granny's Ass
overview: Okarun and Momo arrive at the tunnel to confront Turbo Granny. Just when they think they've won, a giant crab spirit crashes through the wall.

title: Like, Where Are Your Balls?!
overview: Momo and Okarun’s ordeal with Turbo Granny has brought them closer, but things remain awkward between them. Okarun realizes he still has a problem.

title: A Dangerous Woman Arrives
overview: Turbo Granny reveals that Okarun's missing organs are contained within golden spheres. Aira, who has found one, now has the ability to see spirits.

title: To a Kinder World
overview: Momo and Okarun manage to weaken Acrobatic Silky but make a shocking discovery regarding Aira. Acrobatic Silky suggests a surprising way to help.

title: I've Got This Funny Feeling
overview: Aira begins to develop a crush on Okarun. As the three friends' emotions intertwine, they suddenly face another extraterrestrial emergency.

title: Merge! Serpo Dover Demon Nessie!
overview: Aira has awakened the powers of Acrobatic Silky within her and fights the Serpoians alongside Okarun and Momo.

title: Have You Ever Seen a Cattle Mutilation?
overview: Okarun and the girls try to clean up some misunderstandings with their classmates. The aquatic creature reappears before Momo and Aira.

title: First Love
overview: Momo's childhood friend Jiji has come to stay with the Ayases. He explains that he needs Seiko’s help with some strange phenomena at his house.

title: Let's Go to the Cursed House
overview: On the way to investigate the Enjoji house, Okarun feels uneasy about Jiji's closeness to Momo but finds himself drawn to his friendly nature.

title: Like, This Is the Legend of the Giant Snake
overview: As Momo fends off an attack in the outdoor hot spring, Okarun and Jiji panic over how to handle the mysterious room. The doorbell rings.

title: The Evil Eye
overview: In a bid to free Okarun and Momo from the Mongolian Death Worm’s psychic power, Jiji attempts to carry them to safety but runs into a powerful entity.

title: You Won't Get Away with This!
overview: Unwilling to leave Jiji behind, Okarun helps Momo escape to the surface. Momo then begins forming a plan to expose the Death Worm to sunlight.

title: That's, Like, Way Deadly!
overview: Momo tries to stop the magma, but the Kito family gets in her way. The tsuchinoko shrine priest joins the fray... but so does the possessed Jiji.

title: We Can All Stay There Together!
overview: With everyone safely back at Seiko's house, Momo and the others discover that water has a surprising effect on how Evil Eye possesses Jiji's body.

title: We Became a Family
overview: The hayashi musicians arrive and begin an energetic exorcism performance. But just when the ritual is about to succeed, Jiji makes a surprising plea.

title: Feeling Kinda Gloomy
overview: Okarun has an awkward time at the maid café where Momo works. Seiko tries teaching Jiji how to suppress Evil Eye's possession of his body.

title: You Can Do It, Okarun!
overview: Aira and Okarun battle the classical composer spirits. As Okarun struggles to avoid their attacks, Turbo Granny orders him to feel the rhythm.

title: I Want to Rebuild the House
overview: Putting his training to the test, Okarun goes all-out and holds his own against Evil Eye, but the effort causes him to revert to his human form.

title: The Secret Art of Being Attractive
overview: Momo goes to Okarun's classroom to tell him about the golden ball spotted in the housing complex and finds him speaking with a curious classmate.

title: Hey, It's a Kaiju
overview: The sky darkens as Momo, Okarun and Kinta try to evade the giant space monster. They soon run into Aira and Jiji, who give them some much-needed help.

title: Clash! Space Kaiju vs. Giant Robot!
overview: As Momo and the others try to pilot the giant Buddha robot and battle the kaiju, Okarun and Jiji are ejected from the robot and land in a rice paddy.
